config.smartkeyprompts.title: Smart Key Prompts
config.smartkeyprompts.smart_key_prompts: Adjust the scale of the key prompt HUD. Range: 0.0 (invisible) to 10.0 (very large).

Set the position of the key prompt HUD on screen.
1: Top Left
2: Top Center (disabled)
3: Top Right
4: Middle Left
5: Bottom Right
6: Bottom Center (disabled)
7: Bottom Left
8: Center
List of prompt group IDs to hide. Add mod integration IDs (e.g., 'jei_skp', 'emi_skp') to disable their prompts.
